records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Phantom Thief J... Who would've thought she'd take advantage of Luna's naivet959...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Phantom Thief J... Who would've thought she'd take advantage of Luna's naivet959...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Phantom Thief J... Who would've thought she'd take advantage of Luna's naivet959...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! Working hard, or hardly working?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! Working hard, or hardly working?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! Working hard, or hardly working?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Here. I brought some relaxing herbal tea and macarons. Eat them while you work.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Here. I brought some relaxing herbal tea and macarons. Eat them while you work.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Here. I brought some relaxing herbal tea and macarons. Eat them while you work.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh... Thank you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh... Thank you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh... Thank you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Um... What about me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Um... What about me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Um... What about me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hah?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hah?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hah?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hn-Hm, you don't get any.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hn-Hm, you don't get any.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hn-Hm, you don't get any.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Why not?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Why not?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Why not?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're gloomy and skinny. I'm not interested in serving someone who's like that!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're gloomy and skinny. I'm not interested in serving someone who's like that!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're gloomy and skinny. I'm not interested in serving someone who's like that!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Or maybe... if you get on your knees and beg, I might make an exception...? Teehee!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Or maybe... if you get on your knees and beg, I might make an exception...? Teehee!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Or maybe... if you get on your knees and beg, I might make an exception...? Teehee!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A-all right...
records.m_Talk_DEU: A-all right...
records.m_Talk_FRA: A-all right...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! I'm just kidding! No need to get depressed like that!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! I'm just kidding! No need to get depressed like that!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! I'm just kidding! No need to get depressed like that!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't mind Dracasia. She still hasn't gotten rid of her nasty little habit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't mind Dracasia. She still hasn't gotten rid of her nasty little habit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't mind Dracasia. She still hasn't gotten rid of her nasty little habit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, people are going to misunderstand. I was just joking.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, people are going to misunderstand. I was just joking.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, people are going to misunderstand. I was just joking.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! Are you stealing again?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! Are you stealing again?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! Are you stealing again?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh...! It's already in my mouth, so you can't take it away from me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh...! It's already in my mouth, so you can't take it away from me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh...! It's already in my mouth, so you can't take it away from me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just go back to that cafe where you prance around saying, "Master," "Master"!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just go back to that cafe where you prance around saying, "Master," "Master"!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just go back to that cafe where you prance around saying, "Master," "Master"!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh... Herbal tea isn't going to cut it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh... Herbal tea isn't going to cut it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh... Herbal tea isn't going to cut it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All of you, ENOUGH! You're all driving me insane...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: All of you, ENOUGH! You're all driving me insane...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: All of you, ENOUGH! You're all driving me insane...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Gotcha!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Gotcha!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Gotcha!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aaagh!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aaagh!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aaagh!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe! You've been underestimating me this whole time, haven't you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe! You've been underestimating me this whole time, haven't you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe! You've been underestimating me this whole time, haven't you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's why you keep lowering your guard!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's why you keep lowering your guard!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's why you keep lowering your guard!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're dead meat once I catch you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're dead meat once I catch you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're dead meat once I catch you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Bleh!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Bleh!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Bleh!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Got any bright ideas?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Got any bright ideas?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Got any bright ideas?

records.m_Talk_ENG: She lowered her guard because she underestimated Luna... That's it...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: She lowered her guard because she underestimated Luna... That's it...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: She lowered her guard because she underestimated Luna... That's it...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...

root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...
